---
title: "Figure 7"
author: "Phil Zhou"
date: "2025-11-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r load_packages}
library(svglite)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(pheatmap)
library(viridis)
library(gplots)
library(zoo)
library(patchwork)
library(corrplot)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
```

```{r load_dfs}
BEAN_FUSE_FL <- read_csv(
  here("data", "0326_LDLR_mastersheet.csv")
)

alphagenome_SA_raw <- read.csv(
  here("data", "splicing_analysis", "AlphaGenome_SA.csv")
)

alphagenome_SD_raw <- read.csv(
  here("data", "splicing_analysis", "AlphaGenome_SD.csv")
)

fig_7G_mCherry_df <- read_xlsx(
  here("data", "splicing_analysis", "Fig7G_LDLRsplicing.xlsx"),
  sheet = "mCherry_fluorescence"
)

fig_7G_splicing_ratios_df <- read_xlsx(
  here("data", "splicing_analysis", "Fig7G_LDLRsplicing.xlsx"),
  sheet = "splicing_ratios"
)
```

```{r fig_7C}
# Add cysteine flag
BEAN_FUSE_FL <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  mutate(is_cysteine = `Starting AA` == "C")

# ---- Define target variants
GOF_names <- c("G219D", "S213L", "K223E")

# ---- Extract their coordinates from the dataset
GOF_tabet <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  filter(`Variant ID` %in% GOF_names)

# ---- Base plot aesthetic settings
base_theme <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.text  = element_text(size = 16, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

label_size <- 5.5

# ---- Plotting Figure 7C ----
# --- First plot (BEAN vs Tabet uptake score)
fig_7C <- ggplot(
  BEAN_FUSE_FL,
  aes(x = `LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`, y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`, color = is_cysteine)
) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7, shape = 16) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = "black", `FALSE` = "black")) +

  # GOF
  geom_point(
    data = GOF_tabet,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`, y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    shape = 1, size = 3, stroke = 1.2, color = "blue"
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = GOF_tabet,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`, y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`, label = `Variant ID`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = label_size,
    color = "blue"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "LDLR-FL BEAN z score",
    y = "Tabet et al. LDL uptake score"
  ) +
  base_theme

#Printing out figure panel 
fig_7C

# Pearson
 cor(
  BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`,
  BEAN_FUSE_FL$`Tabet LDL uptake score`,
  method = "pearson",
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)

# Spearman
 cor(
  BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`,
  BEAN_FUSE_FL$`Tabet LDL uptake score`,
  method = "spearman",
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)
 
 sum(!is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL BEAN_score normalized`) &
    !is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`Tabet LDL uptake score`))
 
 ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_7"), "Fig7C.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_7C,
  width    = 8,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_7D}
# Drop all-NA columns
alphagenome_SD_raw <- alphagenome_SD_raw %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.))))

# Long format
alphagenome_SD <- alphagenome_SD_raw %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Intronic, Exonic, not.in.LDLR.FL),
    names_to = "region_type",
    values_to = "score"
  ) %>%
  # drop rows where that region has no score
  filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
  # standardize region_type labels
  mutate(
    region_type = recode(
      region_type,
      "Intronic"       = "intronic",
      "Exonic"         = "exonic",
      "not.in.LDLR.FL" = "not.in.LDLR.FL"
    )
  )

# Base theme
base_theme <- theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 18, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

label_size <- 5.5

# Rows to label, with custom text
label_df <- alphagenome_SD %>% 
  filter(!is.na(X) & X != "") %>%
  mutate(
    label_text = c(
      "E615 p2",
      "E615 p3",
      "T713 p3",
      "Q770 p3"
    )
  )

# ---- Plotting Figure 7D ----
fig_7D <- ggplot(
  alphagenome_SD,
  aes(
    x = Distance.to.exon.end,
    y = score,
    color = region_type
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7, shape = 16) +
  
  # --- Label only the highlighted rows with custom text ---
  geom_text_repel(
    data = label_df,
    aes(label = label_text),
    color = "black",
    size = label_size,
    fontface = "bold",
    box.padding = 0.4,
    point.padding = 0.3,
    min.segment.length = 0
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      intronic         = "blue",
      exonic           = "green",
      not.in.LDLR.FL   = "red"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Distance to exon end",
    y = "AlphaGenome splice effect"
  ) +
  base_theme

#Printing out figure panel 
fig_7D

#save figure panel
 ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_7"), "Fig7D.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_7D,
  width    = 8,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_7E}
splicing_variants_713 <- BEAN_FUSE_FL[BEAN_FUSE_FL$Position %in% c(713), ]$`Variant ID`

splicing_tabet_713 <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  filter(`Variant ID` %in% splicing_variants_713)

# ---- Plotting Figure 7E ----
fig_7E <- ggplot(
  BEAN_FUSE_FL,
  aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`)
) +
  # Baseline scatter in black
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7, shape = 16, color = "black") +
  
  # Highlight: splicing variants (green circle)
  geom_point(
    data = splicing_tabet_713,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    shape = 1, size = 3, stroke = 1.2, color = "#86ED18"
  ) +
  
  # Highlight labels
  geom_text_repel(
    data = splicing_tabet_713,
    aes(
      x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`,
      y = `Tabet LDL uptake score`,
      label = `Variant ID`
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = label_size,
    color = "#86ED18",
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "LDLR-FL FUSE score",
    y = "Tabet et al. LDL uptake score"
  ) +
  base_theme

#Printing out figure panel 
fig_7E

 sum(!is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`) &
    !is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`Tabet LDL uptake score`))
 
 # Pearson
 cor(
  BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`,
  BEAN_FUSE_FL$`Tabet LDL uptake score`,
  method = "pearson",
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)

# Spearman
 cor(
  BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`,
  BEAN_FUSE_FL$`Tabet LDL uptake score`,
  method = "spearman",
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)
 
 #save figure panel
 ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_7"), "Fig7E.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_7E,
  width    = 8,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_7F}
# master cleaned df for this relationship
BEAN_FUSE_FL <- BEAN_FUSE_FL %>%
  filter(!is.na(`LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`), !is.na(AlphaMissense))

# ---- Plotting Figure 7F ----
fig_7F <- ggplot(
  BEAN_FUSE_FL,
  aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = AlphaMissense)
) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7, shape = 16, color = "black") +
  
  # Highlight splicing variants
  geom_point(
    data = splicing_tabet_713,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = AlphaMissense),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    shape = 1, size = 3, stroke = 1.2, color = "#86ED18"
  ) +
  
  geom_text_repel(
    data = splicing_tabet_713,
    aes(x = `LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`, y = AlphaMissense, label = `Variant ID`),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = label_size, color = "#86ED18", fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "LDLR-FL FUSE score",
    y = "AlphaMissense"
  ) +
  base_theme

# Pearson
 cor(
  BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`,
  BEAN_FUSE_FL$`AlphaMissense`,
  method = "pearson",
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)

# Spearman
 cor(
  BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`,
  BEAN_FUSE_FL$`AlphaMissense`,
  method = "spearman",
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)

 #Printing out figure panel 
fig_7F

 sum(!is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`LDLR-FL FUSE_score normalized`) &
    !is.na(BEAN_FUSE_FL$`AlphaMissense`))

 #save figure panel
 ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_7"), "Fig7F.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_7F,
  width    = 8,
  height   = 6,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r fig_7G}
#1) Define subsets and order

in14_levels <- c("LDLR-In14", "LDLR-In14-T713T (p3A>G)")
in15_levels <- c("LDLR-In15", "LDLR-In15-Q770Q (p3A>G)")

df_in14 <- fig_7G_mCherry_df %>%
  filter(`Construct identity` %in% in14_levels) %>%
  mutate(`Construct identity` = factor(`Construct identity`, levels = in14_levels))

df_in15 <- fig_7G_mCherry_df %>%
  filter(`Construct identity` %in% in15_levels) %>%
  mutate(`Construct identity` = factor(`Construct identity`, levels = in15_levels))

splice_in14 <- fig_7G_splicing_ratios_df %>%
  filter(`Construct identity` %in% in14_levels) %>%
  mutate(`Construct identity` = factor(`Construct identity`, levels = in14_levels))

splice_in15 <- fig_7G_splicing_ratios_df %>%
  filter(`Construct identity` %in% in15_levels) %>%
  mutate(`Construct identity` = factor(`Construct identity`, levels = in15_levels))

#2) Summary function

summarize_plot <- function(df, splice_df) {
  df %>%
    group_by(`Construct identity`) %>%
    summarise(
      n = sum(!is.na(`P2 Median ECD-A`)),
      mean_signal = mean(`P2 Median ECD-A`, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_signal = sd(`P2 Median ECD-A`, na.rm = TRUE),
      sem_signal = sd_signal / sqrt(n),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    left_join(splice_df, by = "Construct identity") %>%
    mutate(
      splice_label = paste0(
        sub("\\.?0+$", "", sprintf("%.2f", `Percent spliced`)),
        "%"
      )
    )
}

sum_in14 <- summarize_plot(df_in14, splice_in14)
sum_in15 <- summarize_plot(df_in15, splice_in15)

#3) Welch t-tests + Holm correction

p_in14 <- t.test(`P2 Median ECD-A` ~ `Construct identity`, data = df_in14)$p.value
p_in15 <- t.test(`P2 Median ECD-A` ~ `Construct identity`, data = df_in15)$p.value

pvals_adj <- p.adjust(c(p_in14, p_in15), method = "holm")

p_to_symbol <- function(p) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    p <= 1e-4 ~ "****",
    p <= 1e-3 ~ "***",
    p <= 1e-2 ~ "**",
    p <= 0.05 ~ "*",
    TRUE ~ "n.s."
  )
}

sig_in14 <- p_to_symbol(pvals_adj[1])
sig_in15 <- p_to_symbol(pvals_adj[2])

#4) Generic plotting function

make_plot <- function(sum_df, raw_df, sig_label, title_text, show_y_title = TRUE) {

  local_ymin <- min(
    raw_df$`P2 Median ECD-A`,
    sum_df$mean_signal - sum_df$sem_signal,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  local_ymax <- max(
    raw_df$`P2 Median ECD-A`,
    sum_df$mean_signal + sum_df$sem_signal,
    na.rm = TRUE
  )

  local_yrange <- local_ymax - local_ymin

  # in case values are extremely similar
  if (is.na(local_yrange) || local_yrange == 0) {
    local_yrange <- max(abs(local_ymax), 1) * 0.1
  }

  pair_top <- max(sum_df$mean_signal + sum_df$sem_signal, na.rm = TRUE)

  label_y <- local_ymax + 0.08 * local_yrange
  sig_y   <- pair_top   + 0.12 * local_yrange
  y_upper <- max(label_y, sig_y) + 0.06 * local_yrange
# ---- Plotting Figure 7G ----
  
  p <- ggplot(sum_df, aes(x = `Construct identity`, y = mean_signal)) +
    geom_col(
      fill = "#DE647D",
      color = "black",
      width = 0.7
    ) +
    geom_errorbar(
      aes(
        ymin = mean_signal - sem_signal,
        ymax = mean_signal + sem_signal
      ),
      width = 0.2,
      linewidth = 0.5
    ) +
    geom_jitter(
      data = raw_df,
      aes(x = `Construct identity`, y = `P2 Median ECD-A`),
      width = 0.15,
      size = 1.8,
      alpha = 0.75,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_text(
      aes(y = label_y, label = splice_label),
      size = 5
    ) +
    geom_signif(
      annotations = sig_label,
      xmin = 1,
      xmax = 2,
      y_position = sig_y,
      tip_length = 0.01,
      textsize = 5,
      color = "black",
      vjust = 0.3
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(add = 0.5)) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(0, y_upper),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0))
    ) +
    labs(
      x = NULL,
      y = if (show_y_title) "Median LDLR-mCherry" else NULL,
      title = title_text
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 14, colour = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, colour = "black"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16, colour = "black", margin = margin(r = 8)),
      axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.4, colour = "black"),
      axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.5, colour = "black"),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin = margin(6, 12, 24, 12)
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

  if (!show_y_title) {
    p <- p + theme(
      axis.title.y = element_blank()
    )
  }

  p
}

#5) Build the two plots

plot_in14 <- make_plot(
  sum_df = sum_in14,
  raw_df = df_in14,
  sig_label = sig_in14,
  title_text = "Intron 14",
  show_y_title = TRUE
)

plot_in15 <- make_plot(
  sum_df = sum_in15,
  raw_df = df_in15,
  sig_label = sig_in15,
  title_text = "Intron 15",
  show_y_title = TRUE
)

#6) Combine
fig_7G <- plot_in14 / plot_in15

#Printing out figure panel 
fig_7G

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_7"), "Fig7G.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_7G,
  width    = 5,
  height   = 10,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```
```{r fig_7G statistics}
#Compute raw p-values
p_in14 <- t.test(
  `P2 Median ECD-A` ~ `Construct identity`,
  data = fig_7G_mCherry_df %>%
    filter(`Construct identity` %in% c("LDLR-In14", "LDLR-In14-T713T (p3A>G)"))
)$p.value

p_in15 <- t.test(
  `P2 Median ECD-A` ~ `Construct identity`,
  data = fig_7G_mCherry_df %>%
    filter(`Construct identity` %in% c("LDLR-In15", "LDLR-In15-Q770Q (p3A>G)"))
)$p.value

#Holm correction for 2 comparisons
pvals_adj <- p.adjust(c(p_in14, p_in15), method = "holm")

pvals_adj
```

```{r printing_fig_7CDEF}

fig_7CDEF <- ((fig_7C | fig_7D) / (fig_7E | fig_7F))

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(here("output", "figure_7"), "Fig7CDEF.pdf"),
  plot     = fig_7CDEF,
  width    = 10,
  height   = 10,
  units    = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```
